name: accounting firms processing 10–20 legal invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 legal invoices/month, discrepancies cause accounting errors. We automate the compilation and flagging of discrepancies instead of manual review of invoices.
problem_solved: Discrepancies in legal invoices lead to accounting errors.
